title: Adult human small intestine cell dissociation (on ice)
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"vqik","text":"Protocol for human small intestine cell dissociation, performed on ice to reduce artifact gene expression. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}

"],["BSA (Sigma, A8806)","4°C"],["Protease from Bacillus Licheniformis (Sigma, P5380) ","Store 100 μL aliquots (100 mg/mL) in DPBS at -80°C "]],"guid":"1BC350B0458611E99CE33B990B794995","legend":"","mergeCells":[],"rowHeights":[],"show_headers":true}}}}
before_start:
{"blocks":[{"key":"ejiuk","text":" Checklist prior to beginning:
-Centrifuges, large and small, set to 4 ºC
 -Make enzyme stock; thaw two aliquots of Bacillus Licheniformis enzyme on ice.
 -Make 0.04% BSA/PBS (50 mL)
-Things you need: petri dishes, clean forceps, razor blade, pipets, 30 μM filters, timer.
  
 Stock solution for enzyme 
  895 μL DPBS
 5 μL 0.5 M EDTA (2.5 mM final)
  →Add 100 μL enzyme (100 mg/mL) to 900 μL of enzyme stock to make 1X enzyme mix. Add 28 mg of tissue to each 900 μL of enzyme mix.
 ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":1,"length":29},{"style":"bold","offset":277,"length":26},{"style":"italic","offset":116,"length":22}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"8Y6wL","text":"MATERIALS","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":null,"entityRanges":null,"data":null},{"key":"qHAwz","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":null,"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":0,"length":1}],"data":null}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"reagents","mutability":"","data":{"id":120474,"guid":"4199B143341F11EE9D4302C0B41BC903","name":"Please see Guidelines for required materials ","mol_weight":0,"sku":"","url":"","cas_number":"","rrid":"","vendor":{"id":1,"name":"Contributed by users","link":"https://www.protocols.io","is_requested":false,"image":{"source":"/img/vendors/1.png","placeholder":"/img/vendors/1.png"}},"is_public":true,"can_edit":false}}}}
steps: After weighing out tissue, transfer to petri dish on ice and mince tissue using grinding motion with razorblade for 2-3 minutes. 00:02:00, Mince tissue
After tissue is minced finely, add 1 mL enzyme mix per 28 mg of tissue to the petri dish and pipet minced tissue + enzyme into 1.5 mL tube (on ice). undetermined, enzyme mix per 28 mg of tissue
Start timer . Leave tube on ice - initially shake vigorously to break up the tissue , 3- 5x every 30-45 seconds for 5 minutes. 00:05:00 00:00:30
Now, when big chunks are broken up, shake every 1 minute while leaving on ice for 5 additional minutes (10 minutes total time) . 00:05:00 00:01:00
After 15 minutes digest time, triturate digest mix again 10X and spin digest mix at 90 G for 30 seconds at 4 °C. 00:00:30, Spinning Undetermined

Remove supernatant (80%) containing single cells and filter using 30 μM filter while leaving chucks on bottom; rinse filter with 10 mL PBS/BSA into 50 mL conical (on ice) to save single cells. undetermined, PBS/BSA
To residual chunks of tissue add additional 1 mL of enzyme (per 28 mg tissue). undetermined, enzyme (per 28 mg tissue)
Triturate again 10X using 1 mL pipet set to 700 µL .
Continue to shake vigorously every minute for 5 minutes additional time (30 minutes total time) . 00:05:00 00:01:00
Divide flow-through into 2 15 mL tubes.
Carefully remove supernatant - re-suspend both pellets in 100 µL total PBS/BSA in one of the 15 mL conicals. undetermined, PBS/BSA
While excluding as much PBS as possible, weigh out tissue using Mettler.
Shake vigorously 3-4X every minute for 10 additional minutes (25 minutes total time) . 00:10:00, Shaking. 00:01:00
Triturate again 10X and filter using the same 30 μM filter and rinse with 10 mL PBS/BSA into the same 50 mL conical (on ice). undetermined, PBS/BSA
Spin 600 g for 5 minutes at 4 °C. Undetermined, Spinning 00:05:00, Spinning
Add 700 μL RBC lysis buffer to 100 μL PBS/BSA (800 μL total). Triturate 20X using 1 mL pipet. undetermined, RBC lysis buffer undetermined, PBS/BSA
Spin 600 G for 5 minutes at 4 °C. 00:05:00, Spinning Undetermined
Incubate for 3 minutes on ice. 00:03:00, Incubation
Re-suspend in 10 mL total PBS/BSA in the same 15 mL conical. undetermined, PBS/BSA
Remove supernatant.
Briefly re-suspend cells in a small volume of PBS/BSA and check to ensure that there are no more RBCs present.

Analyze quantity and viability of cells using a hemocytometer with trypan blue: add 10 µL of trypan blue to 10 µL of cell suspension, mix by pipeting and pipet into hemocytometer; for Chromium, make concentration to 1 million cells per mL. For DropSeq, make concentration to 100,000 cells/mL.
Spin 600 g for 5 minutes at 4 °C. Undetermined, Spinning 00:05:00, Spinning
Remove supernatant and re-suspend in a small volume of PBS/BSA to check cell concentration.
Add 10 mL of PBS/BSA to 15 mL conical to dilute the RBC lysis buffer. undetermined, PBS/BSA
After 10 minutes total digest time , triturate the digest mix 10X using p1000 set to 700 µL.
Continue shaking every minute for 5 additional minutes (15 minutes total time). 00:05:00 00:01:00
creator: Andrew Potter
